title: A business visitor doesn’t need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## To come to Canada for business activities
You’re coming to Canada for business activities, but you won’t be part of the Canadian labour market.
If this describes you, you don’t need a work permit.
Note: “ Business people ” does not mean the same thing as “business visitors.” Make sure you understand the difference, because “business people” usually need work permits.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
